name: Lac Du Flambeau Public School
description: Lac Du Flambeau Public School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lac du Flambeau, WI. There are 9 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Lol Pickleball
description: Lol Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Land O' Lakes, WI. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Manitowish Waters
description: The courts are just north of the library. Restrooms, water and additional parking is available at the public park just south of the courts.

name: North Lakeland Elementary School
description: 2 new pickleball pickleball only courts from 2023. 3 tennis courts lined for pickleball, resurfaced in 2023.

name: Northland Pines High School
description: Northland Pines High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eagle River, WI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Chalk lines have been drawn, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. Reservations are not available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Phelps School
description: Phelps School is a place to play pickleball in Phelps, WI. There are 8 courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Pitlik's Sand Beach Resort
description: Tennis shoes only, no glassware allowed.

name: Riverview Park
description: Riverview Park is a place to play pickleball in Eagle River, WI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $2 per person to play for non-members
